feature_test_gate_policy.completion_rule: A feature cannot be marked parity-complete unless each applicable gate is covered by a named passing test or explicitly marked not_applicable with a rationale.
feature_test_gate_policy.test_first_rule: Feature work must add or update tests in the same implementation step; regressions found manually must be captured as automated tests before the fix is considered complete.

required_tests.agent_tty_test_when_pty_or_child_process: not_applicable: read-only dashboard without child-process ownership
not_applicable: panel consumes already-recorded events; command actions use command/action gates
not_applicable: command execution covered by command registry/action-menu gates

feature_test_gates.test_command: uv run pytest -q cli/tests/tui/test_inventory_panel.py cli/tests/tui/test_app_shell.py cli/tests/tui/test_agent_tty_smoke.py -rxX
uv run pytest -q cli/tests/tui/test_policy_panel.py cli/tests/tui/test_app_shell.py cli/tests/tui/test_agent_tty_smoke.py -rxX
uv run pytest -q cli/tests/tui/test_logs_panel.py cli/tests/tui/test_app_shell.py cli/tests/tui/test_agent_tty_smoke.py -rxX
uv run pytest -q cli/tests/tui/test_activity_panel.py cli/tests/tui/test_app_shell.py cli/tests/tui/test_agent_tty_smoke.py -rxX

required_tests.agent_tty_test_when_pty_or_child_process: not_applicable: HTTP polling is covered by service fakes; no child process required
not_applicable: index reads are file/service tests; command actions use command gates

feature_test_gates.test_command: uv run pytest -q cli/tests/tui/test_setup_panel.py cli/tests/tui/test_first_run_panel.py cli/tests/tui/test_agent_tty_smoke.py -rxX
uv run pytest -q cli/tests/tui/test_command_line.py cli/tests/tui/test_registry_parity.py cli/tests/tui/test_app_shell.py cli/tests/tui/test_agent_tty_smoke.py -rxX
uv run pytest -q cli/tests/tui/test_first_run_panel.py cli/tests/tui/test_app_shell.py cli/tests/tui/test_agent_tty_smoke.py -rxX

required_tests.mouse_or_click_test_when_clickable: not_applicable: hint text is passive; clickable controls are covered by owning feature gates

feature_test_gates.test_command: uv run pytest -q cli/tests/tui/test_hint_bar.py cli/tests/tui/test_app_shell.py cli/tests/tui/test_agent_tty_smoke.py -rxX
